news.title:
Omaxe's subsidiary gains approval for 4 housing projects in Mohali, Punjab.
This move aligns with Omaxe's strategy to expand its real estate portfolio.
news.summary:
Omaxe's subsidiary gains approval for 4 housing projects in Mohali, Punjab.
This move aligns with Omaxe's strategy to expand its real estate portfolio.

news.title: Omaxe Ltd sold 173 homes in its Faridabad project, generating Rs 800 crore.
news.summary: Omaxe Ltd sold 173 homes in its Faridabad project, generating Rs 800 crore.

news.title: Omaxe's unit obtains RERA registration for Urban Square-14 project in Mohali.
news.summary: Omaxe's unit obtains RERA registration for Urban Square-14 project in Mohali.

news.title:
Omaxe Ltd achieves complete sellout of The Grand Europe commercial units on launch day.
Omaxe secures 100% sales of 173 residential units; invests over ₹1060 crore in Faridabad projects.
news.summary:
Omaxe Ltd achieves complete sellout of The Grand Europe commercial units on launch day.
Omaxe secures 100% sales of 173 residential units; invests over ₹1060 crore in Faridabad projects.

news.title:
Omaxe Ltd approved allotment of 185 secured NCDs worth Rs.18.5 Cr.
Total issued NCDs are 633 of planned 1,994, with 12% IRR and 54-month tenure.
news.summary:
Omaxe Ltd approved allotment of 185 secured NCDs worth Rs.18.5 Cr.
Total issued NCDs are 633 of planned 1,994, with 12% IRR and 54-month tenure.

news.title: Omaxe Ltd's unit secures RERA registration for two Faridabad projects.
news.summary: Omaxe Ltd's unit secures RERA registration for two Faridabad projects.

news.title:
Omaxe's Dec 2025 net sales rose 4.5% Y-o-Y to Rs 301.82 crore, while net loss widened to Rs 153.2 crore.
EBITDA turned negative at Rs 138 crore, and shares delivered 16.97% 6-month returns, closing at Rs 77.68 on Feb 13, 2026.
news.summary:
Omaxe's Dec 2025 net sales rose 4.5% Y-o-Y to Rs 301.82 crore, while net loss widened to Rs 153.2 crore.
EBITDA turned negative at Rs 138 crore, and shares delivered 16.97% 6-month returns, closing at Rs 77.68 on Feb 13, 2026.

news.title:
Omaxe Ltd issued 50 senior secured NCDs worth Rs. 5 crore on Feb 9, 2026.
This is part of a Rs. 199.4 crore issue with a 12% coupon rate and 54-month tenure.
news.summary:
Omaxe Ltd issued 50 senior secured NCDs worth Rs. 5 crore on Feb 9, 2026.
This is part of a Rs. 199.4 crore issue with a 12% coupon rate and 54-month tenure.

news.title:
Omaxe reported Q3 net loss of ₹1.5B, unchanged YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to ₹3B from ₹2.9B YoY, showing improvement.
news.summary:
Omaxe reported Q3 net loss of ₹1.5B, unchanged YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to ₹3B from ₹2.9B YoY, showing improvement.

news.title:
Omaxe Ltd invests Rs. 500 crore in Ludhiana for Omaxe Chowk project.
The 5.25-acre project includes commercial, residential spaces, and modern amenities.
news.summary:
Omaxe Ltd invests Rs. 500 crore in Ludhiana for Omaxe Chowk project.
The 5.25-acre project includes commercial, residential spaces, and modern amenities.

news.title:
Omaxe Ltd entered into an agreement to sell its 40% equity in Aquarise Developers Pvt Ltd to Dinkar Realcon Pvt Ltd, a step-down subsidiary.
The transaction, valued at Rs. 40,000, is categorized as a related-party transaction but executed on an arm's length basis.
news.summary:
Omaxe Ltd entered into an agreement to sell its 40% equity in Aquarise Developers Pvt Ltd to Dinkar Realcon Pvt Ltd, a step-down subsidiary.
The transaction, valued at Rs. 40,000, is categorized as a related-party transaction but executed on an arm's length basis.

news.title:
Omaxe Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Manoj Kumar Dua, President Corporate Accounts, effective December 10, 2025.
The resignation was due to personal reasons, with details available on Omaxe's and stock exchanges' websites.
news.summary:
Omaxe Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Manoj Kumar Dua, President Corporate Accounts, effective December 10, 2025.
The resignation was due to personal reasons, with details available on Omaxe's and stock exchanges' websites.

news.title:
Omaxe repays ₹700+ crore debt early to Samman Capital using project cash.
This move enhances Omaxe's financial stability and boosts its strength.
news.summary:
Omaxe repays ₹700+ crore debt early to Samman Capital using project cash.
This move enhances Omaxe's financial stability and boosts its strength.

news.title:
Omaxe Ltd completed milestones in Chandigarh, Prayagraj, and repaid Rs 229.2 cr SWAMIH loan.
Projects cover 33.6 lakh sq. ft. saleable area with 1,706 units, showcasing strong execution.
news.summary:
Omaxe Ltd completed milestones in Chandigarh, Prayagraj, and repaid Rs 229.2 cr SWAMIH loan.
Projects cover 33.6 lakh sq. ft. saleable area with 1,706 units, showcasing strong execution.

news.title:
Omaxe Ltd acquired a 40% stake in Aquarise Developers Pvt Ltd, making it an associate.
The acquisition involved subscribing to 4,000 shares for Rs. 40,000.
news.summary:
Omaxe Ltd acquired a 40% stake in Aquarise Developers Pvt Ltd, making it an associate.
The acquisition involved subscribing to 4,000 shares for Rs. 40,000.

news.title:
Omaxe reports Q2 net loss of 1.7B INR, improved from 2.39B INR YoY.
Q2 revenue declines to 3.2B INR from 3.89B INR YoY.
news.summary:
Omaxe reports Q2 net loss of 1.7B INR, improved from 2.39B INR YoY.
Q2 revenue declines to 3.2B INR from 3.89B INR YoY.

news.title:
Omaxe Ltd to acquire 100% equity in Next10 Realbuild and Next10 Land Developers.
Acquisition is for Rs. 1 lakh each, aiming strategic growth in real estate.
news.summary:
Omaxe Ltd to acquire 100% equity in Next10 Realbuild and Next10 Land Developers.
Acquisition is for Rs. 1 lakh each, aiming strategic growth in real estate.

news.title:
Guild Builders Pvt. Ltd revoked a pledge on 36.9L Omaxe Ltd equity shares, constituting 2.02% of voting rights.
Post-revocation, Guild Builders retains 63.57% voting rights in Omaxe Ltd, with no change in total equity share capital.
news.summary:
Guild Builders Pvt. Ltd revoked a pledge on 36.9L Omaxe Ltd equity shares, constituting 2.02% of voting rights.
Post-revocation, Guild Builders retains 63.57% voting rights in Omaxe Ltd, with no change in total equity share capital.

news.title:
Omaxe Ltd sold 100 shares of Colors Real Estate to its subsidiary for Rs 23.33 crore.
Colors Real Estate changes from direct subsidiary to step-down subsidiary in related party transaction.
news.summary:
Omaxe Ltd sold 100 shares of Colors Real Estate to its subsidiary for Rs 23.33 crore.
Colors Real Estate changes from direct subsidiary to step-down subsidiary in related party transaction.

news.title:
Omaxe Ltd's credit ratings by CARE Ratings have been reaffirmed as CARE BB (Stable) for long-term bank facilities.
CARE A4 rating for short-term bank facilities was also reaffirmed, while another long-term bank facility rating was withdrawn.
news.summary:
Omaxe Ltd's credit ratings by CARE Ratings have been reaffirmed as CARE BB (Stable) for long-term bank facilities.
CARE A4 rating for short-term bank facilities was also reaffirmed, while another long-term bank facility rating was withdrawn.
